metadata.publisher: Ghana Publishing Company Limited (Assembly Press), Accra
metadata.source_authority: Parliament of the Republic of Ghana
metadata.source_note: Authentic Assembly Press printed National Pensions Act, 2008 (Act 766), downloaded from the Parliament of Ghana DSpace repository ORIGINAL bitstream on 2026-07-07. Text-embedded PDF. Section 3 (Contributions to the Scheme) is on print page 11 and continues to the start of Section 4 on page 12; subsection (1) sets the 5.5% worker contribution, (2) the 13% employer contribution, (3) the 13.5% first-tier / 5% second-tier remittance split of the total 18.5%, and (4) the 18.5%-of-minimum-wage floor. Amendment diligence to record at encode time: the National Pensions (Amendment) Act, 2014 (Act 883) amended Act 766 but did not change the section 3 contribution rates (5.5% / 13% / 18.5% remain the current 2026 rates, matching GHAMOD tscee_s and tscer_s).
metadata.title: National Pensions Act, 2008 (Act 766) — section 3, contributions to the scheme

metadata.publisher: Ghana Publishing Company Limited (Assembly Press), Accra
metadata.source_authority: Parliament of the Republic of Ghana
metadata.source_note: Section 112 (tax reliefs) of the same Assembly Press Act 766 print already captured for section 3 (axiom-corpus#256): subsection (2) treats contributions not exceeding sixteen and one half per centum of a contributor's monthly income as deductible income for the contributor's and the employer's income tax, to the extent of their respective contributions. Amendment diligence as for the section 3 slice: Act 883 (2014) does not alter section 112.
metadata.title: National Pensions Act, 2008 (Act 766) — section 112, tax reliefs
